statement: 'Build-time shift-left for agent artefacts' is not a durable niche: frontier vendors are folding portability into open standards and shipping native permission/sandbox/governance layers, so the niche will be absorbed and a solo Markdown+Python project cannot out-iterate them.

evidence.quote: Anthropic released the Agent Skills specification as an open standard, and OpenAI adopted the same format for Codex CLI and ChatGPT.
MIT-licensed... four-tier execution rings... trust scoring 0-1000... MCP Security Gateway addresses tool poisoning, typosquatting, hidden instructions.

falsifier: Show a sustained, vendor-neutral need: agencies running heterogeneous agents (Claude+Copilot+Cursor+Codex) need ONE policy-governed artefact repo with a fail-closed gate no single vendor will provide cross-platform.
